edge.title: Get EDU Edge
edge.subtitle: Native desktop app. Connect your plant in minutes — no cloud, no Docker, with local AI.
edge.alreadyInstalled: Already have EDU Edge on your PC? Open the app directly.

hero.title: Your plant, in a Unified Namespace.
hero.subtitle: EDU turns fragmented industrial data into a structured system, ready for Industrial AI across every operation.

showcase.title: Talk to your factory.
showcase.subtitle: Use agents to analyze your industrial data and build dynamic dashboards through natural-language conversation with the best LLMs.
bullets: Local LLM running in your plant — no internet required, Zero Trust security
Knowledge Graph for AI: industrial data modeling and structuring
Multi-tenant with full isolation between environments and LGPD compliance
Secure access from anywhere, on any device
showcase.cta: See it running on your plant

features.title: Your plant in a Unified Namespace.
features.subtitle: Industrial protocol convergence, data modeling, dashboards and AI — all from a single source of truth.

scan.title: Network Scan
scan.desc: Discover devices on your industrial network and pre-fill the connection form with 1 click. Detects Modbus, EtherNet/IP, OPC-UA and MQTT.

uns.title: Unified Namespace
uns.desc: Brokers, OPC-UA, Modbus, EtherNet/IP converging into an ISA-95 namespace. Your whole plant in a single topic path.

models.title: Data Models
models.desc: Turn raw tags into clean models. CESMII templates ready to use, mappings with dynamic {{topic.field}} references.

screens.title: Process Screens
screens.desc: SCADA-style canvas with 13 widgets, templates for Cooling Tower, Tank Farm and more. Drag, drop, bind tags.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.desc: Static or dynamic thresholds based on other tags. Discord and WhatsApp notifications out of the box.

ai.title: Plantscape AI
ai.desc: Agents that talk to your plant. Built-in MCP server: ask Claude about processes and get live data, no code required.

editions.title: Cloud or Edge. You decide.
editions.subtitle: Centralized Cloud layer with global intelligence; distributed Edge layer with local sovereignty. Your architecture, the way it makes sense.

midCta.title: Get your plant online.
midCta.subtitle: Demos are with humans — not bots. We block 30 minutes to understand your context before we show the platform.

support.title: Support and Service Level.
support.subtitle: Close technical support, technical partnership, hands-on follow-up from day one. We work side by side with your team to ensure rapid evolution, continuous feedback and real outcomes.

pillars.title: Hands-on from day one
pillars.desc: Guided onboarding with our engineers present from the first setup until go-live.

pillars.title: Fast, continuous evolution
pillars.desc: Public backlog, frequent releases and prioritization driven by what unblocks your operation.

pillars.title: Side-by-side delivery
pillars.desc: Direct line to the people who build it. No ticket queues, no tier escalations.

demo.title: Want to see EDU in action?
demo.subtitle: We onboard new partners in small batches. Tell us about your context and we'll set up a conversation to see if it's a good fit — no sales pressure.
demo.formSubtitle: Only your email is required. The other fields help us tailor the conversation.
demo.legal: No spam. We only use your data to reach out about the program.

fields.name: Name
fields.message: Tell us more about what you'd like to solve

items.title: 30 minutes, straight to the point
items.desc: No generic deck. You describe the problem, we show how the platform handles it.

items.title: Talk to the people who build it
items.desc: You'll be on a call with our engineers, not an SDR. Architecture decisions on the spot.

items.title: Curated by invitation
items.desc: We onboard a few partners per month. Priority goes to operations that fit our approach.

ok.title: We've received your request.
ok.body: We'll review and follow up shortly with next steps. Our outreach is manual — it may take a few business days.

already.title: You're already on the list.
already.body: We've updated your details. Stay tuned — we'll reach out as soon as a seat opens.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage platform access
users.passwordRequired: Password is required for new users

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noBrokerDesc: Configure and connect to an MQTT broker to view Unified Namespace data.

discovery.title: UNS Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Visualize data flow in real-time
discovery.clickNodeHint: Click on a node to see details
discovery.noBrokerDesc: Connect to an MQTT broker to visualize the Unified Namespace graph.

explorer.title: UNS Explorer
explorer.subtitle: Navigate through MQTT topics hierarchy
explorer.selectTopic: Select a topic to see details
explorer.selectTopicHint: Navigate the tree on the left or use search
explorer.noBrokerDesc: To explore Unified Namespace topics, you need to be connected to an MQTT broker.

configuration.title: Broker Configuration
configuration.subtitle: Manage MQTT broker connections
configuration.topicsHint: Use # for multi-level wildcard and + for single-level
configuration.noBrokersHint: Add a broker to get started
configuration.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this broker?
configuration.aboutTip1: The active broker is used to display data in Dashboard and Explorer
configuration.aboutTip2: Use TLS/SSL (port 8883) for secure connections to cloud brokers
configuration.aboutTip3: Topics with wildcard (#) capture the entire message hierarchy
configuration.aboutTip4: You can connect multiple brokers simultaneously
configuration.aboutTip5: For local HiveMQ without authentication, leave username and password blank

reports.title: Smart Reports
reports.subtitle: Generate dynamic dashboards with natural language
reports.placeholder: Describe the report you want to generate...
reports.noDataDesc: No data found for the requested parameters.
reports.unavailableDesc: Make sure Ollama is running on the server.
reports.suggestion1: Show energy consumption in the last 24h
reports.suggestion2: Compare values from the last 30 minutes
